name: aria2
title: aria2
description:
High speed download utility
Aria2 is a command line download client with resuming and
segmented downloading. Supported protocols are HTTP/HTTPS/
SFTP/FTP/BitTorrent and it also supports Metalink.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use aria2c because High speed download utility.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use aria2c as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `aria2c [<OPTIONS>] [<URI>|<MAGNET>|<TORRENT_FILE>|<METALINK_FILE>] ...` as documented upstream for aria2c.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `aria2c "$KFIOSA_TARGET_URL"` as documented upstream for aria2c.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `aria2c "$KFIOSA_TARGET_URL" "$KFIOSA_TARGET_URL"` as documented upstream for aria2c.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `aria2c -x2 -k1M "$KFIOSA_TARGET_URL"` as documented upstream for aria2c.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair aria2c with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `aria2c --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.

documentation.readme: aria2c - The ultra fast download utility
documentation.how_to_use: Install/setup: sudo apt install aria2 (1.37.0+debian-4). Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `aria2c [<OPTIONS>] [<URI>|<MAGNET>|<TORRENT_FILE>|<METALINK_FILE>] ...`. Further invocations from upstream: `aria2c "$KFIOSA_TARGET_URL"`; `aria2c "$KFIOSA_TARGET_URL" "$KFIOSA_TARGET_URL"`.
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'install' phase against surfaces [local] in the Kali Linux category. Fits when the engagement needs: High speed download utility.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool because: High speed download utility.
usage_sections: Install with: sudo apt install aria2 (1.37.0+debian-4)
Install with: sudo apt install aria2 (1.37.0+debian-4)
